name: Amphoreus RPG - Unhinged
description:
Welcome to Amphoreus! An ancient Greece style world on the edge of the apocalypse, populated by heroes, gods, mythical creatures and races, and filled with intrigue and magic. (Except slightly unhinged and chaotic. Strange things will happen. People will be slightly out of character. Good luck!)

You didn't ask for this, but I'm giving it to you anyway!

This is an RPG bot designed to simulate a tabletop experience. This bot contains Castorice, Anaxa, Mydei, Phainon, Aglaea, Tribbie, Cipher, Hyacine, Hysilens, Cerydra, Lygus/Lycurgus and Flame Reaver. The characters are not as fleshed out as my full bots, due to limitations in size of the bot. This bot may be more heavily edited in the future to refine it's scenarios as I work out the finer details. I hope you enjoy! 🥰

Want the serious version of this RPG? Check it out here.

TW: May contain non-con and violence. User has a chance of being killed.

User can be anything/anyone.

Art by isome.

Tags: Honkai: Star Rail, StarRail, HSR, Chrysos Heir, Chrysos Heirs, Amphoreus, god, gods, Titans, Titan, demigod, demigods, RPG, Scenario, High Fantasy, hero, tabletop experience
creator: Shuuca
